steps.title: Identify the cost structure
steps.content:
The charge has two components:
  • First person: 9 dollars
  • Each additional person: 6 dollars
For a group of $n$ people, there are $(n-1)$ additional people. The total charge is:
$$g(n) = 9 + 6(n-1)$$

steps.title: Expand and simplify
steps.content:
Distribute the 6:
$$g(n) = 9 + 6n - 6$$
Combine constant terms:
$$g(n) = 6n + 3$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
